raw_source.title: [Remote or New Zealand] CENNZnet is looking for Rust/Substrate engineer
raw_source.body:
新西兰web3 项目， 招聘mid to senior level Rust/Substrate developer

Experience required:

- Skilled in relevant programming languages e.g. rust, solidity, C++, go,

- Understanding of blockchain protocol design (smart contracts, consensus, p2p networking, cryptography, DeFi, NFTs)

- Experience working with relevant frameworks, databases, tools and testing libraries (e.g. substrate, tendermint)

- Experience maintaining an opensource codebase

需要基本英文能力，可以远程工作， 也欢迎来新西兰工作&生活&移民 （雇主很乐意提供工签担保）

感兴趣的朋友请联系Roy Sun - 微信：ysun062
email: [roy.sun@sunrecruitment.co.nz](mailto:roy.sun@sunrecruitment.co.nz)

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
